---
title: "February 2026"
description: "Bioinformatics Tools"
date: 02-27-2026
image: image.png
categories: [software, genomics, transcriptomics, ML] # self-defined categories
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---

Our next event taking place on the 27th of February, from 3pm will be on the broader theme of Bioinformatics tools.

**Date:** 27th February, 3-4pm

**Location:** Room 331b, Maths and Stats

**Talks:**

-   **Yiyi Cheng:** Cell DiffErential Expression by Pooling (CellDEEP)
-   **Elcid Aaron Pangilinan:** Standing on the Shoulders of Scikit-Learn: How Out-of-the-Box Libraries become Novel Biological Solutions in Malaria Research (upsML)

Looking forward to seeing you all there!

The CompBio Team
